com.mentor.chs.api.report

Interface IXReportContext


  • @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXReportContext

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static java.lang.String HARNESS_DESIGN_NAME 
      static java.lang.String INTEGRATOR_DESIGN_NAME 
      static java.lang.String LOGIC_DESIGN_NAME 
      static java.lang.String TOPOLOGY_DESIGN_NAME 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.List<java.lang.String> getBuildLists()
      Returns the buildlists selected.
      java.util.List<IXDesign> getDesigns()
      Returns the list of designs selected for generation of the report.
      java.lang.String getDesignType()
      Return the type of design.
      java.util.List<java.lang.String> getHarnesses()
      Returns the list of harnesses selected for generation of the report if designs are of type IXLogicDesign
      IXLibrary getLibrary()
      get interface to access library objects
      IXProject getProject()
      Returns the project assosciated with the designs selected.
      IXQueryExpressionFactory getQueryExpressionFactory() 
      IXQueryFactory getQueryFactory()
      get a factory interface to form queries
      IXReportFactory getReportFactory()
      report factory is used to create a report and its allied objects (modules/templates) see IXReport,IXReportModule and IXReportTemplate.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXSBOM> getSBOMs()
      Returns the SBOMs selected.
      IXHelper getXHelper()
      Returns the helper class.

    • Method Detail

      • getReportFactory

        IXReportFactory getReportFactory()
        report factory is used to create a report and its allied objects (modules/templates) see IXReport,IXReportModule and IXReportTemplate.
        Returns:
        get factory object for this session.

      • getQueryFactory

        IXQueryFactory getQueryFactory()
        get a factory interface to form queries
        Returns:
        a factory object

      • getQueryExpressionFactory

        IXQueryExpressionFactory getQueryExpressionFactory()
        Returns:
        get a factory interface to access system defined expressions and create new expressions

      • getLibrary

        IXLibrary getLibrary()
        get interface to access library objects
        Returns:
        a IXLibrary object

      • getDesigns

        java.util.List<IXDesign> getDesigns()
        Returns the list of designs selected for generation of the report. All the designs are garuanteed to be of the same type i.e. IXLogicDesign or IXPlaneDesign or IXHarnessDesign
        Returns:
        List of IXDesigns

      • getDesignType

        java.lang.String getDesignType()
        Return the type of design. Returns one of IXReportContext.LOGIC_DESIGN_NAME, IXReportContext.INTEGRATOR_DESIGN_NAME, IXReportContext.HARNESS_DESIGN_NAME, IXReportContext.TOPOLOGY_DESIGN_NAME

        Note: The value returned by this method depends on the type of design returned by getDesigns(). For build lists and SBOMs, this value has no relevance

        Returns:
        IXReportContext.LOGIC_DESIGN_NAME or IXReportContext.INTEGRATOR_DESIGN_NAME or IXReportContext.HARNESS_DESIGN_NAME or IXReportContext.TOPOLOGY_DESIGN_NAME

      • getHarnesses

        java.util.List<java.lang.String> getHarnesses()
        Returns the list of harnesses selected for generation of the report if designs are of type IXLogicDesign
        Returns:
        List of Strings

      • getProject

        IXProject getProject()
        Returns the project assosciated with the designs selected.
        Returns:
        IXProject, containing the selected designs.

      • getXHelper

        IXHelper getXHelper()
        Returns the helper class.
        Returns:
        helper.

      • getBuildLists

        java.util.List<java.lang.String> getBuildLists()
        Returns the buildlists selected.
        Returns:
        List<String> is the list of buildLists selected by user.

      • getSBOMs

        java.util.Set<? extends IXSBOM> getSBOMs()
        Returns the SBOMs selected.
        Returns:
        List of selected SBOMs
